mapper.select: SELECT * FROM points_products WHERE status = 'ON_SALE' ORDER BY points_cost ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE points_products SET stock = stock - 1 WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND stock > 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM points_exchanges WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY exchange_time DESC
SELECT * FROM points_exchanges ORDER BY exchange_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_exchanges (exchange_id, user_id, product_id, product_name, points_cost, status, exchange_time) VALUES (#{exchangeId}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{pointsCost}, #{status}, #{exchangeTime})

INSERT INTO points_products (product_id, product_name, category, points_cost, stock, description, image_url, status, create_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{productName}, #{category}, #{pointsCost}, #{stock}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{createTime})
